reviews.title: Great sound
reviews.text: Love, love, love this speaker! It stays charged forever when I'm using it or even if it has been sitting for a while. I think the sound is great and since it is waterproof I can jam out while in the shower! The downside is my daughter keeps stealing it from me so she can use it. :)

reviews.author: mackee

reviews.title: usb charge port defective
reviews.text:
Very disappointed! It is nearly impossible to charge because the port does not hold the usb plug securely. it is necessary to gently jiggle the plug until it is just right (the red light comes on)...and any little bump knocks it loose. I have used multiple cords, all of which work fine for other devices, so it IS a mechanical defect of the device itself. Recently I met someone else with the same problem, so this might be more than me just getting a bad one.

Beyond this, it is not easy to operate & can be difficult to pair.
So, no, I cannot recommend it to others.
reviews.author: leeO

reviews.title: WAYYYY Better than imagined.
reviews.text: My son (w/Obvious help from Dad) gave me this for my bday last Nov. He knows I love chilling out back with my music and my phone speakers can be funny at times. How sweet of him to remember this. Of course he knows I love music anyway and I always have it going to do various chores as well. So, this is really great! At first I thought, ok it’ll be an “ok” sounding speaker, but it really is loud! Has really good bass sound without bottoming out. Very clear,quality sound. No, it’s no JBL sound, but it’s realky good. Did I say loud? So anyway it’s supoosed to be water resistant/proof. I had no intention of trying it out, but I assumed a little rain drop here or there wouldn’t hurt it and I’d bring in anyway. Well, it turned up missing once for 2 days. It turned out it got left outside in a 2 day rainstorm! It still works!! I love this thing! And it does sync super easy to phone. Some items can be tricky but this one pairs with no issues. I highly recommend!
reviews.author: 1GoofyMom

reviews.title: Good speaker
reviews.text: Good quality sound, perfect size, nice color. I live on a busy main road so during the summer with the windows open, I have to blast my tv to hear it.
